_about: World B = client clean-core modernization, NOT ATC-forced. A *working released* BAPI/FM is not an S/4HANA readiness (ATC) finding. The skill MUST NOT report these as must-fix. It may note a key-only modernization target. Exception: a genuinely obsolete FM the Simplification DB flags -> mark 'verify in SYCM, release-dependent'. Source: Deloitte 'Prompt Skils 1 to 4.txt' (World A/B separation) + the Input Program ZR_SD_OPEN_ORDER_MARGIN_COCKPIT.

entries.note: Working released create BAPI. Clean-core modernization to EML is key-only, not ATC-forced.

Working read BAPI. Modernize to released CDS only if clean-core mandated.
